name: A19 LED Bulb, GU24, 9W, 800 Lumens
description: Features: Seamless Dimming : Offers 10%-100% dimming for customizable lighting, providing sunlight-like quality with true color rendering and a GU24 twist-lock base. Energy Efficient : Reduces energy consumption by up to 85%, lasting longer than traditional bulbs and lowering relamping costs. Versatile Applications : Safe for artwork and ideal for various spaces, including bedrooms, kitchens, offices, and lamps, with low heat output and no UV emission. Certified Performance : ENERGY STAR, UL, FCC, and RoHS certified, ensuring instant bright light without buzzing or flickering, compliant with Title 20 standards. Durable and Reliable : 5-year warranty, 25,000-hour lifetime, and a robust build with frosted aluminum and polycarbonate materials for damp-rated environments.
short_desc: Specifications: Lumen Output: 800 lm Efficacy: 89 lm/W Wattage: 9W Wattage Equivalent: 60W Input Voltage: 120V Operating Temperature: 4°F – 104°F Dimmable: Yes Color Temperature Options: 2700K / 3000K / 4000K / 5000K / 6000K CRI: 90+ Beam Angle: 240° Moisture Rating: Damp Rated Bulb Base: GU24 Finish: Frosted Material: Aluminum, Polycarbonate Certifications: ENERGY STAR, UL, FCC, RoHS Switching Cycles: 10,000 Lifetime: 25,000 Hours Warranty: 5 Years
